command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.118 '
echo === PHASE C: RUNTIME SMOKE TESTS ===

cd /opt/moreno-ai

echo --- IDENTITY RUNTIME ---
python3 runtime/agent_identity_loader.py --validate all 2>&1 | tail -10

echo --- ENVIRONMENT CLOCK ---
python3 runtime/environment_runtime.py --clock 2>&1 | tail -5

echo --- STORY LIST ---
python3 runtime/story_runtime.py --list --repo /opt/moreno-ai 2>&1 | tail -5

echo --- AUDIT RECORDS WRITTEN ---
ls /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance/ | wc -l

echo PHASE_C_DONE
' 2>&1
